name: AHB — Part A: FUB → Slack stage notifications

parameters.content:
## 📣 PART A — Follow Up Boss → Slack stage notifications
When a lead is **created** or its **stage changes** in FUB, post a formatted message to the right Slack channel.

Two FUB webhooks (`peopleCreated`, `peopleStageUpdated`) point at the **one** Webhook URL below; the flow fetches the full record, decides the route, and posts. Channels are environment-aware (staging/prod) via `CHANNEL_ENV` in the shared config.

### ① Receive & fetch the lead
**FUB Webhook** — receives FUB’s `peopleCreated` / `peopleStageUpdated` events. Payload is *thin* (`event`, `resourceIds`, `uri`).

**FUB Get Person** — GETs `/v1/people/{id}?fields=allFields` (HTTP Basic, API key = user). NOTE: `fields=allFields` is **required** or the *Lead Manager* custom field is missing. Retries 3× on failure.

### ② Decide the route
**Route + Build Message** (Code) runs the shared routing logic:
• stage → channel (Routes 1–9)
• closer stages routed by `Assigned To` (Reyes / Flora / Marco)
• closer stage with no `Assigned To` → catch-all to **#lead-managers**
• no-notify / unknown stages → **skip**

Outputs the target channel **ID** + the Block Kit message.

### ③ Post to Slack (or skip)
**Skip?** (IF) — if the router said `skip`, route to **No notification** (intentional dead-end; nothing posts).

Otherwise → **Post to Slack** — posts the Block Kit message to the chosen channel **by ID** (bot token, retries 3×).
